productDisplayName: Puma Men Cabana Racer White Sports Shoes
description: The height of style in 1981 brings forward a look that captivates the look of the present with the puma Cabana Racer. Upper Suede and textile upper for a cool combination of look and texture Contrast puma formstripe for an iconic look Logo tag at the tongue for style Dual hook-and-loop closure for a snug, customised Fit Soft textile lining for comfort Padded tongue and collar for extra cushioning Midsole Removable sockliner with Kinder-Fit technology to create a customised fit Lightweight cushy midsole for supreme comfort and support Outsole Durable rubber outsole with flex grooves for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces
